description.en: The China Textile Information Center (CTIC) is a public institution under the China National Textile and Apparel Council, responsible for textile industry information services, trend research, and standard testing. It publishes textile market data, fashion trend reports, and industry statistics.
description.zh: 中国纺织信息中心是中国纺织工业联合会下属事业单位，负责纺织行业信息服务、趋势研究和标准检测。发布纺织市场数据、时尚趋势报告和行业统计。
